name: SB Technology Holdings, Inc.
business: SB Technology Holdings, Inc. is a drug discovery and development company researching two core technologies: Targeted Peptide Technology (TPT) and Metabolic Disruption Technology (MDT). It has one drug research program in clinical stage, an MDT therapy for cancers with solid tumors. It also has one drug research program in pre-clinical stages, a TPT therapy for HIV/AIDS using VG1177.

exposures.sentence: We are a drug discovery and development company researching two core technologies: Targeted Peptide Technology, or TPT, which is currently our main focus, and Metabolic Disruption Technology, or MDT, which is our secondary focus.

catalysts.event: Completion of animal safety studies for VG1177
catalysts.sentence: We now expect these studies to conclude in early 2016.
We plan to file an IND for our chosen indication with the FDA in mid 2016.
